# CampaignServingStateReasons

**Type**

Reasons the system provides when a campaign can’t run.

## Declaration

```swift
string CampaignServingStateReasons
```

## Discussion

Ad creatives in campaigns with an `APPSTORE_TODAY_TAB` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource] receive a review from Apple for compliance.  Ads that are pending review are on hold until Apple completes the review. The system doesn’t serve rejected ads.

## Data Types

- **AdChannelType**: The channel type of an ad in a campaign.
- **BillingEventType**: The type of billing event for a campaign.
- **CampaignCountryOrRegionsServingStateReasons**: Reasons that displays when a campaign can’t run.
- **CampaignDisplayStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **CampaignServingStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **CampaignStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **PaymentModel**: The payment model that you set.
- **SupplySource**: The ad placements for a campaign.
